text:
SymphonicSuite[AoT]Part2-3rd:Before Lights Out is the 12th track on disc 1 of the "Attack on Titan" Season 3 Original Soundtrack.

As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .
Lyrics: Benjamin & mpi
Vocals: Laco

Musical motifs

The track is a remix of APETITAN.

Lyrics

 
 
English= 
Freedom!
Freedom!
Forgive me!

Retake Maria!
Victorious, triumphant!

All of my kingdom
For your return
I'd let it all burn!
I'd let it all burn!
Dear departed

I'll cry for you in a dream
Now I must rise to be queen
Be worthy!
Be worthy!
